```{r, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
repeat {
  mu <- sample(seq(-2,3,0.5),1); v <- sample(seq(0.5,6,0.5),1)
  vals <- round(c(v,v+mu^2,mu,sqrt(v),2*v),3)
  if (length(unique(vals)) == 5L) break
}
opts <- sprintf("$%.3f$",vals)
```

Question
========
Uma variável tem fgm $M(t)=\exp\{`r mu`t+`r v`t^2/2\}$. Qual é sua variância?

Answerlist
----------
* `r opts[1]`
* `r opts[2]`
* `r opts[3]`
* `r opts[4]`
* `r opts[5]`

Solution
========
$M'(0)=\mu=`r mu`$ e $M''(0)=\mu^2+`r v`$. Logo,
$$\operatorname{Var}(X)=M''(0)-[M'(0)]^2=`r v`.$$

Meta-information
================
exname: Cap1S9Q5_momentos_pela_fgm
extype: schoice
exsolution: 10000
exshuffle: TRUE
